text.title: Accessibility Evaluation Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules anchoring the accessibility-evaluation methodology, each grounded in a source.

rule.statement: Stage 1 automated scan MUST be treated as catching 30-40% of issues; compliance claims based on automated results alone are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Deque + WebAIM 2024 data: tools miss ARIA misuse, focus order in modals, live-region behaviour, cognitive a11y, and text-over-image contrast.

rule.statement: axe-core version MUST be pinned per repo; CI MUST fail on minor-version drift.
rule.rationale: Minor versions add new rules; an axe-clean baseline at v4.8 produces phantom violations at v4.9 with no code changes.

rule.statement: Stage 3 keyboard test MUST cover: Tab reaches every interactive element, visible focus, logical order, skip links, no keyboard traps, documented shortcuts non-conflicting with AT.
rule.rationale: WCAG 2.2 SC 2.1.1, 2.4.3, 2.4.7, 2.4.11 each require separate verification; tools cover none reliably.

rule.statement: For SPA frameworks, audit MUST re-run after every route transition and async state change; focus restoration after navigation is mandatory.
rule.rationale: SPAs frequently drop focus to body after navigation, forcing screen-reader users to restart reading.

rule.statement: Screen-reader verification MUST use the established pairings: NVDA+Firefox, JAWS+Chrome, VoiceOver+Safari (Mac + iOS), TalkBack+Chrome (Android).
rule.rationale: AT behaviour differs by browser pairing; off-pair findings are not industry-standard evidence for VPAT/ACR.

rule.statement: Findings from an agent claiming a screen-reader observation MUST be rejected unless accompanied by audio recording or verbatim machine-readable transcript.
rule.rationale: LLMs cannot reproduce NVDA/JAWS/VoiceOver speech buffers; agent-invented transcripts appear plausible but are not evidence.

rule.statement: If the Skip-If preconditions hold, the methodology MUST be skipped and the caller routed to the linked alternative.
rule.rationale: Applying this machinery to the wrong workflow burns tokens without producing a usable artefact.
